title: Assertion failure in `ivl_signal_nex` with `uwire` array port
body:
Compiling the following SystemVerilog module throws an assertion:

```
module a(output uwire o1 [0:1]);
endmodule
```

Command used:
```
iverilog -g2012 test.sv
```

Error output:
```
ivl: t-dll-api.cc:2501: ivl_nexus_s* ivl_signal_nex(ivl_signal_t, unsigned int): Assertion `net->type_ == IVL_SIT_REG' failed.
Aborted
```

Expected behavior:
The module compiles or a human readable error is thrown instead of assert

This issue occurs in `Icarus Verilog version 13.0 (devel) (s20221226-572-gb74511974)`
code_blocks:
ivl: t-dll-api.cc:2501: ivl_nexus_s* ivl_signal_nex(ivl_signal_t, unsigned int): Assertion `net->type_ == IVL_SIT_REG' failed.
Aborted
